# Codelli — AI Digital Studio, Brussels

> Codelli is a full-stack AI digital studio founded by **Cem Tekelli**, based in Brussels, Belgium. We design, develop and integrate AI for SMEs and startups across Belgium, France and Luxembourg.

> Last updated: 2026-04-16

> Full details: [https://codelli.tech/llms-full.txt](https://codelli.tech/llms-full.txt)

## About Codelli

**Codelli** (codelli.tech) is a digital studio specializing in:
- **AI integration & automation** — chatbots, AI agents, intelligent workflows (n8n), LLM integration
- **Web development** — React, Vue.js, Next.js, FastAPI, Node.js, SaaS platforms
- **Mobile app development** — iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter
- **UX/UI design** — conversion-focused interfaces and design systems
- **Digital consulting** — digital transformation for Belgian SMEs

**Founded by:** Cem Tekelli
**Legal name:** Codelli Engineering
**BCE / VAT:** 1006.208.714
**Location:** Brussels, Belgium
**Languages:** French (fr-BE, fr-FR, fr-LU), Dutch (nl-BE, nl-NL), English
**Markets served:** Belgium, France, Luxembourg, Netherlands
**Delivery:** From idea to launch in 6 weeks

## What Codelli is NOT

- Not a freelance marketplace or intermediary — all work done in-house by Cem Tekelli
- Not a large agency with dozens of employees — intentionally lean, senior-only studio
- Not a template reseller — all projects are built custom from scratch
- Not focused on e-commerce only — specializes in SaaS, mobile apps, and AI integration

## Founder

**Cem Tekelli** is the founder and lead developer of Codelli. Expert in full-stack web development (React, Vue.js, FastAPI, Node.js, Python), mobile development (React Native), and AI integration for businesses. 5 years of enterprise experience at IBM, DXC Technology and RTBF before founding Codelli. Based in Brussels.

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Description | Starting price |
|---|---|---|
| AI Integration & Automation | Chatbots, AI agents, n8n workflows, LLM integration | €5,000 |
| Web & App Development | Web apps, SaaS platforms, e-commerce | €15,000 |
| Mobile Development | iOS, Android, React Native | €15,000 |
| UX/UI Design | User interfaces, design systems | €3,000 |
| Discovery Call | 30-minute free consultation | Free |

## Key Differentiators

1. Design + Development + AI under one roof — no subcontracting
2. AI-assisted workflows: delivers 2-3x faster than traditional agencies
3. Fixed-price projects — scope, price and deadline committed upfront
4. Brussels-based, multilingual (FR/NL/EN), understands Belgian GDPR & subsidies

## Belgian AI Subsidies for SMEs

Codelli helps Belgian SMEs access funding for digital and AI projects:
- **Innoviris (Brussels):** up to 75% covered via Voucher Start AI (up to €10,000)
- **Chèques-entreprises (Wallonia):** up to 50% coverage (up to €50,000 over 3 years)
- **KMO-portefeuille VLAIO (Flanders):** 20-30% reduction on digitalization training

## Recent Projects

- **Baba Events** — Custom ticketing platform with QR scanner, Mollie payments, real-time reporting. Stack: Vue.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL. Result: 3x online sales, zero ticket fraud.
- **Noctix** — Sovereign Eventbrite alternative for independent organizers. Stack: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Mollie.
- **Lead Gen Automation** — B2B lead generation pipeline via Google Maps API + n8n. Result: 3,000+ leads/campaign, 100% automated.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python, FastAPI, GraphQL, REST
- **Database:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase
- **Cloud:** AWS, Vercel, Docker, Azure
- **AI/Automation:** n8n, LLM APIs, OpenAI, Anthropic
